description_long: This is a rustic, handcrafted wooden ladder with a visibly irregular and organic form, likely made from natural tree branches. The ladder features two vertical side rails that are slightly curved and uneven, giving it a unique, artisanal appearance. There are seven horizontal rungs, each also irregular in shape and spacing, connecting the side rails. The wood surface appears rough and unfinished, with visible grain and natural imperfections. The ladder lacks any modern safety features such as anti-slip feet or stabilizer bars. Its overall construction suggests it is intended for light-duty use, possibly in a garden, backyard, or as a decorative piece in an urban setting.
description: A rustic, handcrafted wooden ladder with uneven, natural side rails and seven irregularly spaced rungs. The surface is rough and unfinished, emphasizing its artisanal, organic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, curved side rails, and all seven unevenly spaced rungs.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the ladder and the irregular curvature of the rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the rungs and the organic, asymmetrical shape of the rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim, uneven nature of the ladder's construction.
